svg.title: SciRet 15-day plan — two author task division
svg.desc: A visual breakdown of tasks across 15 days split between Kaysarul and Co-author, organized by week with daily milestones and blockers.
svg.text: Target: May 25 · Two authors · Four blockers cleared
Score 150 answers · get faithfulness + ctx recall
Revise abstract + intro · add grounded generation angle
Remaining 25 queries · send annotated CSV back
Replace pseudo GT · rerun recall table · update paper
Add REALM, Self-RAG, BioMedLM · 3 new paragraphs
Run DeBERTa-v3 · compute CIS vs RAGAS Pearson r
50 reference answers for RAGAS ground truth eval
End of Week 1 checkpoint — all 4 blockers cleared
Update all tables with real labels
CIS vs RAGAS correlation · hallucination examples
Merge all updates · align tables + figures · check ACL page limit (8 pages)
Grounded generation · LLM deployment · answer quality
Full paper review — both authors read complete draft
Flag weak arguments · unclear claims · missing citations · page count
Address all review comments · final figures · abstract polish
Paper is submission-ready by end of this day
Days 11–15 — Buffer · ARR submission · reviewer registration
